nba_games.article: Wizards have home court advantage and are in better form late season. Bulls struggling with consistency and travel fatigue on East Coast road game.

nba_games.article: Timberwolves possess superior perimeter defense and pace control. Pacers capable but inconsistent scoring without consistent third option.

nba_games.article: Bucks are Eastern Conference powerhouse with elite two-way play, while Nets are lottery-level team in rebuild mode. Talent disparity is significant.

nba_games.article: Raptors own home court and have slight edge in depth; Heat are formidable but traveling after recent heavy schedule. Home cooking favors Toronto.

nba_games.article: Celtics are East's best team with championship pedigree; Hornets are sub-.500 in young rebuild. Boston's depth and defensive intensity will overwhelm Charlotte.

nba_games.article: Warriors own Chase Center with elite three-point shooting and motion offense. Kings are competitive but Warriors' shooting depth creates edge in California matchup.
